weaknesses: Extremely bare-bones single-page site — no service detail pages
No online booking or estimate request tool
No city/service area landing pages despite serving Colorado Springs metro
No testimonials showcased on site (mentions Yelp but doesn't embed them)
Basic template site with minimal content depth
No team/about page beyond generic description
strengths: Clear email and phone on site
Lists specific services (remodeling, new construction, panel upgrades, lighting design)
notes: Colorado Springs electrical contractor. Very basic single-page site with minimal content. No online booking or estimate request despite offering 'free, at home & job site consultations.' Email (info@coenergyelectric.com) clearly listed. Phone: 719-402-1300. Has 5-star Yelp rating but doesn't integrate reviews on site. Major lead capture gap — no conversion mechanism beyond a phone number and email.
